response: Profile: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented professional with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription. I have extensive knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties, including Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Internal Medicine, ENT, Family Medicine, Neurology, and Dermatology. I possess strong interpersonal skills, excellent teamwork abilities, and a willingness to learn and develop new skills. I am reliable, dependable, and consistently seek new responsibilities to contribute to organizational success. My experience includes medical transcription, editing, and customer relationship management, with a proven ability to meet deadlines and maintain high accuracy. I am a multi-tasker who excels in supervisory roles and has a strong track record in improving productivity and quality. I am passionate about customer service and continuously strive to enhance my skills in the medical transcription field.
